mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_data (user_id, heart_rate, systolic_pressure, diastolic_pressure, blood_sugar, temperature, health_status, description, monitor_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{heartRate}, #{systolicPressure}, #{diastolicPressure}, #{bloodSugar}, #{temperature}, #{healthStatus}, #{description}, #{monitorTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_data SET heart_rate = #{heartRate}, systolic_pressure = #{systolicPressure}, diastolic_pressure = #{diastolicPressure}, blood_sugar = #{bloodSugar}, temperature = #{temperature}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, description = #{description}, monitor_time = #{monitorTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (#{startTime} IS NULL OR monitor_time >= #{startTime}) AND (#{endTime} IS NULL OR monitor_time <= #{endTime})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_warning (health_data_id, user_id, warning_type, warning_level, warning_desc, is_processed, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{healthDataId}, #{userId}, #{warningType}, #{warningLevel}, #{warningDesc}, #{isProcessed}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data h JOIN health_warning w ON h.id = w.health_data_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM health_data WHERE health_status = 'abnormal' AND monitor_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_warning_threshold (indicator_type, min_value, max_value, is_active, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{indicatorType}, #{minValue}, #{maxValue}, #{isActive}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_warning_threshold SET indicator_type = #{indicatorType}, min_value = #{minValue}, max_value = #{maxValue}, is_active = #{isActive}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_warning_threshold WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY indicator_type
SELECT * FROM health_warning_threshold WHERE indicator_type = #{indicatorType} AND is_active = 1
